# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit + public API tests in `tests/`)
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated (if public behavior changed)
- [ ] Opt-in suites considered (fuzz/race/bench) for high-value changes

## OCPP compliance (if applicable)

- Operation:
- `.req` / `.conf`:
- Spec reference (section/page):
- Example payload:
- Expected behavior:
- Actual behavior:
